# Readme


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

These examples reproduce the results presented in our paper
*“Discovering Quantum phenomena with Interpretable Machine Learning”*,
covering simulations across a range of quantum systems:

- Experimental snapshots of [Rydberg atoms](qdisc_Rydberg.ipynb)
- Classical shadows of the [cluster Ising
  model](qdisc_ClusterIsing.ipynb)
- Hybrid data of a [fermionic system](qdisc_FKM.ipynb)

These are more advanced examples aimed to reproduce the results of our
paper. For a more detailed walkthrough of the library, refer to the
tutorials on [VAEs](../tutorials/J1J2_tuto1_VAE.ipynb) and [symbolic
regression](../tutorials/J1J2_tuto2_SR.ipynb).

For exact reproducibility, the examples were run with the following
package versions:

    jax==0.4.38
    jaxlib==0.4.38
    netket==3.15.2
    flax==0.10.4
    optax==0.2.4
    CUDA 12.4
